category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI tool for interacting with Forgejo; official Codeberg project page is forgejo-contrib/forgejo-cli.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is forgejo-cli; official project name and executable fj identify it as Forgejo CLI.
docs_sources: Official Codeberg repository page is the homepage and README documentation surface for this CLI.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Codeberg project URL; source_facts.source-archive is from codeberg.org/forgejo-contrib/forgejo-cli.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official Codeberg project URL identify an fj CLI client for Forgejo.
